title: Deconovo Rectangle Tablecloth Faux Linen Water Resistant Table Cloth for Dinning 52x70in(132x178cm) Linen
features: This tablecloth is water resistant and wipeable
Deconovo rectangle tablecloth is made of high quality fabric which will last for ages

These Faux Linen tablecloths are a perfect addition to any indoor dining occasion either for decorative or functional purposes (Cafes, dinners, weddings, brunches, potlucks, buffets, picnics, baby showers and more).
This tablecloth is made of a spill proof fabric. All Liquids and spills will bead up for an easy clean
Recommended to hand wash below 30 degree. Gentle cycle, do not bleach, tumble dry at low temperatures, Warm Iron.
